sections.paragraph:
Original: נוּא

Transliteration: nû'

Phonetic: noo

BDB Definition:

  1. to hinder, hold back, forbid, disallow, restrain, frustrate
    1. (Qal) to hinder, hold back
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to restrain, forbid, frustrate
      2. to restrain, make averse, discourage

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1317

Part(s) of speech: Verb
